validation_gate.rule: a bounded add/delete/replace edit is adopted only if it strictly improves the held-out mean band-accuracy; ties that add a line are discarded (KISS)

golden_protection: tests/golden/code-review/maintainability/run_golden.py must stay green after any edit (oracle in-band + schema gate); a regression rejects the edit
adoption: staged for user review — never auto-adopted
backend: central config.toml (resolve order: claude-cli session -> ollama)
